description_long: This object consists of a large, irregularly shaped slab of gray stone with a rough, natural surface. Atop the slab, there is a sculpted white stone figure resembling an animal, possibly a stylized dog or similar quadruped, with a pronounced head and body. Behind the animal figure, a smaller, upright stone element with a tan hue stands, suggesting a marker or post. The main slab has a slightly undulating surface with visible textural variations and subtle circular markings. The animal figure is smooth and contrasts with the rougher base, while the upright element appears more weathered. The overall composition gives the impression of a decorative or commemorative stone installation, likely intended as a visual barrier or marker in an urban setting.
description: A large, rough gray stone slab supports a smooth, white sculpted animal figure and a smaller tan upright stone, forming a decorative urban barrier.
description_view_0: From this view, the white animal figure is seen in profile, with the tan upright stone behind it and the broad, flat gray slab dominating the foreground.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the animal figure and the upright tan stone, showing more of the slab's irregular edge and surface texture.
description_view_2: The animal figure is viewed from the rear, with both the white and tan elements aligned, emphasizing the length of the gray slab.
description_view_3: The animal figure is seen from the opposite side, with the tan upright stone more visible and the slab's surface details prominent.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on pavement or landscaped area
attribute_pattern: Subtle natural veining and mottling on the slab, with smooth sculpted surfaces on the animal figure and a weathered texture on the upright stone.
attribute_weathering: The slab appears moderately weathered with some surface smoothing, while the upright stone shows more pronounced aging; the animal figure is relatively smooth and less weathered.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: The stone slab sits prominently above ground, contrasting with paved or landscaped urban surfaces, and the sculpted elements draw visual attention as a focal point.
